name: Search Templates Library

releases.author: Pentchaff
releases.description:
I'm excited to introduce Search Library Plugin v1.0, designed to enhance your Obsidian search experience.

What's New:
Graph View Integration: Visualize your search results with an integrated Graph View pane, revealing connections within your notes.
Template-Enabled Search: Create and utilize custom search templates for precise and tailored search queries.
Customizable Shortcuts: Assign shortcuts for quick access to Free and Template-Enabled Searches.
Get Started:
Download and install Search Library Plugin v1.0 from Obsidian's Community plugins section.

I hope you find this plugin valuable in your workflow, and I welcome your feedback. Enjoy the new search experience!
releases.name: Obsidian Search Library Plugin v1.0: Enhanced Search Functionality with Graph View and Template Integration
